svg.text: 38 PCAWG Lung-AdenoCA SBS96 spectra refit against the 67-signature COSMIC v3 GRCh37 catalog.
Minimum fit cosine: 0.984; all values computed from the saved 38-sample public input.
Rank-6 extraction uses seed 20260521, 8 starts, and 700 maximum iterations.
